comment: Master weightings + block/skip seed for the slayer advisor module. Weighting principle: never skip what gates the active goal.

masters.name: Chaeldar
masters.notes: Bridge to Konar; fine pre-85 combat.

masters.name: Konar
masters.notes: Brimstone keys; location-locked tasks — good gp/supply income mid-game.

masters.name: Nieve/Steve
masters.notes: Default point farming master from ~85 combat.

masters.name: Duradel
masters.notes: Post-Shilo, best task pool late; boss tasks.
